cta_health_issues: Too many CTAs (23). Research shows effectiveness drops after 3-4. Consider removing the weakest ones.
Thought leadership article with 5 hard commercial CTAs. This makes editorial content feel like a sales page.
CTA 'See pricing' targets decision readers but article is awareness-stage content.
